name: Test Summary User
summary:
* User initiated the conversation.
* User asked about AI's well-being.
* Callio AI responded positively.
* Callio AI offered immediate help.

name: Format Test User
summary:
* User initiated a test call.
* He was checking upload and summary.
* Callio AI gave an automated response.
* It confirmed no recording overwrite.

name: Angraj Karn
summary:
* User ne Mahabharat aur apne naam Angraj Karn ke baare mein poocha.
* Callio AI ne Angraj Karn ko ek important character bataya.
* Callio ne Karn ki kahani aur janm explain kiya.
* AI ne Karn ke Arjun se yudh ka reason bataya.

name: Vishnu
summary:
* Callio AI ne Vishnu ko purani convo se recognize kiya aur uska naam, city, agency mention ki.
* Vishnu ne Callio AI ko challenge kiya ki woh uski 'funny conversation' ya previous statements yaad kare.
* Callio AI detailed recall mein struggle kiya aur naye topic par move karne ki koshish ki.
* Vishnu finally frustrated hokar call cut karne ko bola.
